---
title: Verifications
bibliography: references.bib
sidebar: main
page-navigation: true
---

The pages below compare pySLAMMER's results against external references — the legacy SLAMMER program for the bundled motion suite, and analytical solutions for harmonic ground motions. For the equivalent-linear coupled analysis, computational performance is also compared.

* [Comparison of pySLAMMER's results to SLAMMER's](comp_SLAMMER_results.qmd)
* [Comparison of pySLAMMER's speed to SLAMMER's](comp_SLAMMER_perf.qmd) *(placeholder — study scoped but not yet written up)*
* [Comparison of pySLAMMER's results to an analytical solution](comp_analytical.qmd) *(placeholder — study scoped but not yet written up)*
